scripts.db:migrate: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter backend exec prisma migrate dev --name init
scripts.db:generate: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter backend exec prisma generate
scripts.db:reset: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter backend exec prisma migrate reset
scripts.db:studio: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter backend exec prisma studio
